posts.title: Suspicious IAM activity? Five CloudTrail lookups I run first
posts.excerpt: When someone says "something odd happened in IAM," you do not need a fancy SIEM on day one. CloudTrail already has the story — if you know which events to pull first.

posts.title: IAM privilege escalation: patterns you'll actually see in the wild
posts.excerpt: AWS IAM privilege escalation isn't about zero-days. It's about abusing legitimate permissions in ways the account owner didn't intend. Here are the patterns that come up most often.

posts.title: Hi, I'm Karthik - LLM & Cloud Security Engineer
posts.excerpt: LLM Engineer and Cloud Security Engineer—models in production, AWS IAM and guardrails, and the overlap between the two. This is my corner of the internet.
